services.page_sub: From websites to AI — we've got the tools and talent to move your project forward.
services.web_desc: Clean, fast, and scalable websites built with modern frameworks. Whether it's a landing page, portfolio, or full web app — we deliver quality code that grows with you.
services.ai_desc: Practical AI integrations that solve real business problems. From chatbots to automated workflows — we help you work smarter, not harder.
services.cta_text: Not sure which service fits you?

web_pricing.page_sub: Transparent pricing, no hidden fees. Pick the package that fits your needs and budget.
web_pricing.custom_sub: Got a unique project? Let's talk and we'll build a tailored quote just for you.
web_pricing.pkg_portfolio_desc: Perfect for students and fresh grads who need a clean online presence fast.
web_pricing.pkg_umkm_desc: Ideal for small businesses wanting a professional web presence without breaking the bank.
web_pricing.pkg_basic_desc: A solid starting point for businesses that need a complete, professional website.
web_pricing.pkg_professional_desc: Full-featured website built for growth — with advanced features and premium quality.

ai_pricing.page_sub: Practical AI built for real problems. Transparent pricing, fast delivery.
ai_pricing.custom_sub: Got a complex use case? We'll design a custom AI solution that fits your exact needs.
ai_pricing.pkg_chatbot_desc: A smart, always-on AI chatbot that handles customer questions, orders, and support — 24/7.
ai_pricing.pkg_cleaning_desc: Messy spreadsheets? We'll clean, format, and prep your data so it's ready for analysis or ML.
ai_pricing.pkg_eda_desc: Understand your data deeply. We dig into your dataset and surface patterns, trends, and insights.
ai_pricing.pkg_ml_desc: End-to-end machine learning — from feature engineering to a deployable model tailored to your problem.
ai_pricing.pkg_dashboard_desc: Beautiful, interactive dashboards that turn your raw data into clear business intelligence — on demand.

faq.page_sub: Got questions? We've got answers. If you don't find what you're looking for, just reach out.
faq.cta_sub: We're happy to answer anything. Just send us a message.
faq.q_general_1: What kind of clients do you work with?
faq.a_general_1: We work with everyone from university students and fresh graduates to small business owners (UMKM), startups, and professional institutions. If you have a project, we'd love to help.
faq.q_general_2: How long does a project typically take?
faq.a_general_2: It depends on the scope. A basic website or portfolio can be done in 3–7 days. A full professional website takes 2–4 weeks. AI and data projects vary from 1 week to 2 months depending on complexity.
faq.q_general_3: Do you offer payment in installments?
faq.a_general_3: Yes! We typically split payments into 50% upfront and 50% on delivery. For larger projects, we can arrange a 3-stage payment plan. Just ask us and we'll work something out.
faq.q_general_4: How do I start a project with you?
faq.a_general_4: Simple — fill out the contact form, send us a WhatsApp, or shoot us an email. Tell us what you need, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a proposal.
faq.a_general_5: Our listed prices are starting points — the final price depends on the exact scope of your project. We're always open to discussing what works within your budget.
faq.q_web_1: Can I request changes after the website is delivered?
faq.a_web_1: Yes, every package includes a support period (1–3 months depending on the package) where we handle minor revisions and tweaks at no extra cost. Major changes outside scope may be quoted separately.
faq.q_web_2: Will my website work on mobile phones?
faq.a_web_2: Absolutely. Every website we build is fully responsive and tested across different screen sizes — phones, tablets, and desktops.
faq.q_web_3: Do you handle domain and hosting?
faq.a_web_3: We can help you set up domain and hosting. Hosting costs are separate and depend on the provider you choose. We'll guide you through the whole process.
faq.q_web_4: What is a CMS and do I need one?
faq.a_web_4: A CMS (Content Management System) lets you update your website content — like text, images, and blog posts — without touching any code. We include it in the Professional package and can add it to others for an extra fee.
faq.q_web_5: Can you redesign my existing website?
faq.a_web_5: Yes! Share your current site with us and tell us what you'd like to improve. We'll assess it and give you a custom quote.
faq.q_ai_1: What platforms can the AI chatbot be integrated with?
faq.a_ai_1: Currently we support WhatsApp (via WhatsApp Business API), web chat widgets, and Telegram. Other platforms like Instagram DM or LINE can be arranged on request.
faq.q_ai_2: Do I need technical knowledge to use the AI chatbot?
faq.a_ai_2: Not at all. We handle the full setup and training. You just manage your business — the bot does the rest. We also provide a simple guide for managing FAQs and responses.
faq.q_ai_3: What format does my data need to be in for EDA or ML projects?
faq.a_ai_3: We work with most common formats — Excel (.xlsx), CSV, Google Sheets, or even PDFs (with some limitations). If your data is messy or inconsistent, our Data Cleaning package handles that first.
faq.q_ai_4: How accurate will the machine learning model be?
faq.a_ai_4: Accuracy depends heavily on data quality and quantity. We're upfront about realistic expectations during scoping. We'll tell you honestly what's achievable — no overpromising.
faq.q_ai_5: Can the dashboard connect to live / real-time data?
faq.a_ai_5: Yes, for an additional setup fee we can connect dashboards to live data sources like Google Sheets, databases, or APIs. Static data (uploaded files) is included in the base package.

why_us.page_sub: We're not the biggest agency — but we might be the most committed one.
why_us.reason_1_desc: No buzzwords, no confusing tech talk. We explain everything in plain language so you're always in the loop.
why_us.reason_2_desc: You'll know exactly what you're paying for. No hidden fees, no surprises at the end of a project.
why_us.reason_3_desc: We respect your deadlines like our own. When we set a timeline, we stick to it.
why_us.reason_4_desc: Budget-conscious packages designed for students, fresh grads, and small business owners without cutting corners on quality.
why_us.reason_5_desc: We don't disappear after delivery. Every project includes follow-up support so you're never left on your own.
why_us.reason_6_desc: We measure success by your outcomes — traffic, conversions, efficiency gains — not just by pretty designs.

portfolio.page_sub: A selection of projects we're proud of. Real clients, real results.
portfolio.project_1_desc: A student performance tracking dashboard for a local university. Built with Flask and Chart.js — helping lecturers identify at-risk students early.
portfolio.project_2_desc: A WhatsApp-integrated AI chatbot for an SME clothing brand. Handles FAQs, order tracking, and product recommendations — 24/7.
portfolio.project_3_desc: A sleek personal portfolio site for a fresh computer science graduate — showcasing projects, skills, and contact in one clean page.
portfolio.project_4_desc: A digital platform for Desa Wisata Tingkir Lor, Salatiga — showcasing local SMEs including fabric and clothing production, scenic spots, Javanese culture, and religious tourism.
portfolio.project_5_desc: An interactive sales & revenue dashboard for an FMCG distributor — turning raw transaction data into real-time business intelligence with filters, KPI cards, and automated monthly reports.
portfolio.project_6_desc: A machine learning model that predicts student dropout risk for a vocational school — trained on attendance, grades, and socioeconomic data to help counselors intervene early.
portfolio.project_7_desc: An exploratory data analysis project for an online marketplace SME — uncovering buying patterns, peak hours, and top-performing product categories to guide their marketing strategy.

contact.page_sub: Have a project, a question, or just want to say hi? We're quick to reply.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Describe your project, goals, or any questions...
contact.success_desc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.quick_desc: Need a faster reply? Chat with us directly on WhatsApp — we usually respond within minutes.
contact.quick_wa_text: Hi Arunika! I'd like to get a quick response about your services.

testimonials.label: Client Stories
testimonials.headline: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.t1_text: The dropout prediction model completely changed how we identify at-risk students. We can now intervene early instead of reacting too late. Remarkable accuracy.
testimonials.t2_text: Our WhatsApp bot handles hundreds of customer questions every day — without us lifting a finger. Sales response time went from hours to seconds.
testimonials.t3_text: Before SalesVision, our monthly reports took days to prepare. Now everything is real-time and automated. Decision making has never been faster.
testimonials.t4_role: Head of Academic Affairs, SMAN 2 Semarang
testimonials.t4_text: EduTrack gave our lecturers a clear view of student progress they never had before. Reporting time dropped by 40% and early interventions increased significantly.
testimonials.t5_text: Our village finally has a proper digital presence. Local SMEs and tourism spots are now discoverable online. Visitors have increased since the website launched.
testimonials.t6_text: The analysis uncovered buying patterns we had no idea existed. We restructured our promotions around the insights and saw a clear uplift in conversion within weeks.
testimonials.t7_text: My portfolio site looked incredibly professional from day one. I landed my first three freelance clients within a month of going live. Worth every rupiah.

meta.home_desc: Professional web development and AI solutions for students, SMEs, and institutions.
